docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,534.00 FILED BY RIANDA, ERICA AS TO DEFENDANT VINTHER, THEODORE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED MAY-12-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VINTHER, THEODORE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT VINTHER, THEODORE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED BY REQUEST OF DEFENDANT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-26-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ERICA RIANDA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THEODORE VINTHER IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIANDA, ERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VINTHER, THEODORE $7,920.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,045.00, SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
